The '''Killing House''' was a location in the [[clone military education complex]] on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], used for the training of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] in anti-terrorist operations. [[Niner Skirata|Niner]] recalled that the layout was changed constantly, so the trainees never knew which doors the "terrorists" were behind, and they were never told whether the ammunition they were using was live or simulated. The Killing House was also known as Arena a17.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1stm}}
